name: A Walk Along the Wall
short_description: A challenging & Lovecraft-inspired boss-rush top-down twin-stick shooter. Bosses of great scale and challenge. A small yet potent arsenal. A wickedly unique soundtrack. Go forth and kick their teeth in.
detailed_description:
Words for the Wise

Controller Recommended. If using a PS4 controller (after adding it in steam's controller settings) then in-game enable the "PS4" option in the controls menu (accessible with the Escape key outside of the main menu)


About the Game

A Walk Along the Wall is a challenging & Lovecraft-inspired boss-rush top-down twin-stick shooter.

Save your wife & doom humanity.

Driven by grief at the passing of your partner, search for the Book of Eibon.

Translate its passages. Make the sacrifice.

Bring her back and die trying.

Master stolen wisdom. Let logic scatter.

Wield weapons and abilities levied by arcane madness.

Fight back against the ever-growing onslaught 'neath that gibbous crack in space.

Delve into the formless void. Awaken those slumbering things most foul.

Lost in pitch, claw through the hordes of spawn which erupt from eternal shadow.

Find the thing responsible. End its presence.

Go insane. Die. And do it all again.
